toolbox_name: SparkFun RHT03 Humidity and Temperature Sensor

rht03_init.tooltip: Create and initialize RHT03 humidity and temperature sensor

rht03_update.tooltip: Read RHT03 sensor data, returns 1 for success, negative for error

rht03_temp_c.tooltip: Get the last read Celsius temperature from RHT03

rht03_temp_f.tooltip: Get the last read Fahrenheit temperature from RHT03

rht03_humidity.tooltip: Get the last read relative humidity percentage from RHT03
